verse.name: v1
verse.lines: LORD, I want to live my life to please You I bring my heart before You to remold Make of me a vessel fit for honor That I might shine to You as sparkling gold

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: /: To be pleasing You, pleasing You This is all I really wanna do. :/

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: LORD, I lift my heart in full surrender And all that I hold dear I give to You Purify my heart and make me holy So I might walk the way that's pleasing You.
